items.title: Daily Issues Report
items.description: Generates a daily summary of open issues and recent activity as a GitHub issue
items.searchText: daily issues report generates a daily summary of open issues and recent activity as a github issue schedule

items.title: OSPO Contributors Report
items.description: Monthly contributor activity metrics across an organization''s repositories.
items.searchText: ospo contributors report monthly contributor activity metrics across an organization''s repositories. schedule workflow_dispatch

items.title: OSPO Organization Health Report
items.description: Comprehensive weekly health report for a GitHub organization. Surfaces stale issues/PRs, merge time analysis, contributor leaderboards, and actionable items needing human attention.
items.searchText: ospo organization health report comprehensive weekly health report for a github organization. surfaces stale issues/prs, merge time analysis, contributor leaderboards, and actionable items needing human attention. schedule workflow_dispatch

items.title: OSPO Stale Repository Report
items.description: Identifies inactive repositories in your organization and generates an archival recommendation report.
items.searchText: ospo stale repository report identifies inactive repositories in your organization and generates an archival recommendation report. schedule workflow_dispatch

items.title: OSS Release Compliance Checker
items.description: Analyzes a target repository against open source release requirements and posts a detailed compliance report as an issue comment.
items.searchText: oss release compliance checker analyzes a target repository against open source release requirements and posts a detailed compliance report as an issue comment. issues workflow_dispatch

items.title: Relevance Check
items.description: Slash command to evaluate whether an issue or pull request is still relevant to the project
items.searchText: relevance check slash command to evaluate whether an issue or pull request is still relevant to the project slash_command roles

items.title: Relevance Summary
items.description: Manually triggered workflow that summarizes all open issues and PRs with a /relevance-check response into a single issue
items.searchText: relevance summary manually triggered workflow that summarizes all open issues and prs with a /relevance-check response into a single issue workflow_dispatch
